DeviceJWT.description: Device-signed ES256 JWT minted by the client. The JWT header must include kid set to the device id, and the aud claim must be h4ckath0n:http.

get.description: Default root route provided by h4ckath0n.

Response Admin Update Project Admin Projects  Project Id  Patch
Response Admin Project Export Admin Projects  Project Id  Export Get

post.description: Verify the WebAuthn attestation and attach the new passkey to the user.

400.description: Invalid or expired flow, or WebAuthn verification error.

post.description: Begin adding a new passkey for the authenticated user and return registration options.
Finish passkey login by verifying the WebAuthn assertion for the flow and binding an optional device key.

401.description: Invalid credentials, revoked passkey, or expired flow.

post.description: Begin a username-less passkey login ceremony and return WebAuthn authentication options.
Finish passkey registration by verifying the WebAuthn attestation for the flow and binding an optional device key.

400.description: Invalid or expired flow, or invalid WebAuthn payload.

post.description: Begin a passkey registration ceremony. Creates a new user and a single-use challenge flow, then returns WebAuthn registration options.

400.description: Invalid request or WebAuthn configuration error.

get.description: List all passkeys, including revoked entries, for the current user.

patch.description: Update the user-facing name of a passkey.

post.description: Revoke a passkey by its internal key ID. The last active passkey cannot be revoked and returns the LAST_PASSKEY error.

detail.message: Cannot revoke the last active passkey.

409.description: Cannot revoke the last active passkey.

get.description: Return all memberships with project info for the current user.

post.description: Echo back the message along with its reverse.

get.description: Simple liveness ping for the demo namespace.

Authenticated SSE stream that simulates LLM-style output chunks.

Auth: ``Authorization: Bearer <device_jwt>`` with ``aud = h4ckath0n:sse``.
Basic health check for the app.
Readiness check for E2E and deployment probes.
